researchActivities.title: Academic Journals

researchActivities.title: Conference Presentations
researchActivities.description: Faculty and student presentations at national and international academic conferences and seminars.

researchActivities.description: Interdisciplinary studies involving collaboration between faculty members, students, and external researchers.

researchActivities.description: Research projects focused on technology innovation, educational advancement, and social impact.

focusAreas.title: Educational Technology

focusAreas.title: Applied Research
focusAreas.description: Practical research projects addressing specific problems in industry, education, and community development.

focusAreas.title: Interdisciplinary Studies
